title: 04619_Efficient_RL_via_Disentangled_Environment_and_Agent_Representations
negative_examples: SEAR's performance on learning representations for multi-task learning is not fully clear, indicating potential limitations in its application.
SEAR has not yet been tested on real-world environments, which raises concerns about its practical applicability and effectiveness.
SEAR does not provide any benefit over other approaches when the robot is not visible in the input image, which could limit its usability in certain scenarios.
